rationale: verification_command: cd cli && go test -run "TestPluginLookup_PrefersProjectOverGlobal|TestPluginLookup_FallsBackToGlobal|TestInstall_ConventionMode|TestInstallProject_Convention" ./cmd/... ./internal/registry/...

All three acceptance criteria are satisfied by existing code and tests already in the repository at the base commit (0f1306229):

AC1 — convention mode install writes to XDG projects path and creates project-tier links:
  Verified by TestInstall_ConventionModeWritesXDGProjectTree, TestInstall_ConventionMode_WritesXDGProjectPluginsAndLinks,
  TestInstall_ConventionMode_WritesXdgProjectTreeAndLinks, TestInstallProject_ConventionLinks, and TestInstallProject_ConventionMode
  in cli/cmd/install_test.go and cli/cmd/install_global_test.go.
  Implementation: cli/cmd/install.go resolveInstallDirs() calls ddxroot.Path() which resolves to XDG convention root
  when no .ddx/ in-tree dir exists.

AC2 — TestPluginLookup_PrefersProjectOverGlobal:
  Exists and passes in cli/internal/registry/resolve_test.go.
  Implementation: registry.ResolvePlugin() checks projectPluginPath first in cli/internal/registry/resolve.go.

AC3 — TestPluginLookup_FallsBackToGlobal:
  Exists and passes in cli/internal/registry/resolve_test.go.
  Implementation: registry.ResolvePlugin() falls back to globalPluginPath when project layer is absent.

No code changes are needed; the work was completed by sibling beads in the same epic.
